summary: Privacy page displays core legal content correctly with proper heading, effective date, and section structure. Uses cream background and rose action links as specified. Minor advisory note on border weight deviation from diner component standards.

violations.description: Legal longform article uses lighter border weight than the documented 1px specification for legal content - appears to have no visible border or very light border treatment

actions: Verify border weight matches the 1px specification for legal longform articles
Ensure the article card maintains the documented legal content border treatment
